ResearchProjectDef.label: RobCo OS
ResearchProjectDef.description: Reverse-engineer the recovered RobCo operating system and adapt it for use in a modern mechanitor network. This is required to deploy RobCo's Securitron line and the heaviest RobCo war machines.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Liberty Prime path
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the Liberty Prime branch of RobCo OS, including securitron fabrication and the Liberty Prime recovery path.

ResearchProjectDef.label: War Machine path
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the War Machine branch of RobCo OS, including the liberator fabrication route and the War Machine recovery path.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Pacificator path
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the Pacificator branch of RobCo OS, including the Pacificator recovery path and the Scurrybot fabrication line.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Synth path
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the synthetic-personnel branch of RobCo OS for the placeholder synth fabrication line.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Think Tank path
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the Big MT think-tank branch of RobCo OS, including the Roboscorpion queen recovery path and the think-tank xenotype ritual.
